description: Sets a hatch pattern angle for an event highlight. When two events share outcomes, each event draws diagonal lines at its own angle. Overlapping cells show a crosshatch pattern, making the intersection visually obvious.
utility: Set hatch pattern angle for overlapping events

examples.expression:
S = sspace(coin(3), at(4,10), view(10,10))
E = event(S, "at least 2 H", fc(red), hatchangle(45))
F = event(S, "first = T", fc(blue), hatchangle(-45))
